full_text:
Xi Shou
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Shouwas born in Nan. Accused Lou Gui of disrespect towards Cao Cao, resulting in Lou’s death. Xi Shou was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
